hero.title: Your Name
hero.subtitle: Full-stack developer & designer crafting digital experiences that are beautiful, accessible, and blazingly fast.

about.bio1: I'm a full-stack developer with 5+ years of experience building web applications that users love. I specialize in Nuxt.js, Vue, and modern TypeScript, with a deep passion for performance, accessibility, and clean code.
about.bio2: When I'm not coding, you'll find me contributing to open-source projects, writing about web development, or exploring the latest in AI and design systems.
